mapper.select: SELECT kb.id AS kanban_id, kb.kanban_code, kb.status AS kanban_status, kb.board_qty, kb.received_at, o.id AS order_id, o.inbound_no, o.status AS order_status, l.id AS line_id, l.line_no, l.planned_qty, l.received_qty AS line_received_qty, l.material_id, m.material_code, m.material_name, l.target_warehouse_id, l.target_location_id, sl.warehouse_id AS location_warehouse_id, sl.location_name FROM kanban_board kb JOIN inbound_order o ON o.id = kb.inbound_order_id JOIN inbound_order_line l ON l.id = kb.inbound_order_line_id JOIN material m ON m.id = l.material_id JOIN storage_location sl ON sl.id = l.target_location_id WHERE kb.kanban_code = #{kanbanCode} FOR UPDATE

SELECT id, material_id, warehouse_id, storage_location_id, on_hand_qty, updated_at FROM inventory_balance WHERE material_id = #{materialId} AND warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND storage_location_id = #{storageLocationId} FOR UPDATE
